testcase.name: test_create_pos_sale
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration17_new_features.py:102: in test_create_pos_sale assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create POS sale: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create POS sale: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","sale_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"amount":100.0,"payment_mode":"cash","branch_id":"1c348f2b-294e-4353-bac1-0e32f759f109","description":"TEST_POS_Sale","date":"2026-01-15T12:00:00Z"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","payment_details"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"amount":100.0,"payment_mode":"cash","branch_id":"1c348f2b-294e-4353-bac1-0e32f759f109","description":"TEST_POS_Sale","date":"2026-01-15T12:00:00Z"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
